---
name: Citation or reference
about: Suggest a relevant paper, case study, or industry reference
title: "[CITATION] "
labels: citation
assignees: ''
---

**Location**
Which chapter, section, or pattern entry would benefit from this reference?

**Reference**
Full citation in APA format.

**Relevance**
Why is this reference relevant? Does it support, challenge, or extend an argument made in the book? One or two sentences is sufficient.

**Note**
Please check the existing `references.bib` file before submitting — the reference may already be included.
